sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMETZ);
INSERT INTO test_time_data (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timetz '15:35:02.002345+01:00');
SELECT minute(event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_time_data WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_time_data SET event_time = timetz '16:45:05.000000+00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT minute(event_time) AS updated_event_minute FROM test_time_data WHERE id = 1;
